title: PurePerformance
description: An Optimalization modpack just for your needs. Made for Low and High end PCs too
body:
[![Header Logo Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8de34200966ed867e4d18e0bbda7edeb88daa3fa.png)](https://modrinth.com/frog) [![https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural_64h.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/berniestorystudio)ㅤ [![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true)](https://fabricmc.net/) ㅤ[![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pperformance) ㅤ[![https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png?raw=true](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/jXbCMXssdz) ## Performance⚡ and your needs in One ⭐Lightweight modpack ### **Make your Minecraft Smooth like 🧈 (butter)!** Get the FPS you want!

‎ --------------------------- ### ❔️ Why choose us over others? Our modpack preformed way Better than others (Simply Optimized) on a 3y old laptop. ## 📊 Stats

Image ![Modpack Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a018ace16000cb72d34d4cae771d09c21070fbf_0.webp)
### ✨ Mods And Textures
View - Krypton - Palladium - Text Placeholder API - Mod Menu - Better F3 - Sodium Extra - Your Options Shall Be Respected - Packet Fixer - Noisium - ~~Idle Tweaks~~ - Ksyxis - Entity Texture Features - Incendium Bioms Only - ToadLib - spark - ModernFix - Almanac - Let Me Despawn - ~~Idle Boost~~ - Smooth Menu Refabricated - TT20 (TPS Fixer) - Noxesium - Immediately Fast - Architectury API - ShutterFix - Incendium - Fabric Language Kotlin - Fabric API - Mod Loading Screen - FerriteCore - Entity Model Features - Stfu - Model Gap Fix - Dynamic FPS - Tool Tip Fix - Reese's Sodium Options - Indium - Smooth Scrolling - Icons - Unique Dark - Lithium - Sodium - Cloth Config API - Entity Culling - Pureperformance Originals - Icons Advertisement Removal - Icons - Additions
